items.p: It was another successful week for "AEW Dynamite" in the TV ratings as the July 15 episode managed to top the Beach Break special.

items.h: AEW Dynamite (7/15) Draws Nearly 800,000 Viewers On Cable TV
items.p: AEW Dynamite viewership and ratings information for the July 15 episode. Wrestlenomics reports that AEW Dynamite on July 15 drew 786,000 viewers on TBS. This number is up from the 773,000 viewers...

items.h: Speedball Mike Bailey Targeting Champions In AEW's DCF
items.p: "Speedball" Mike Bailey contemplated in his latest "SpeedVlog" if he should target all the champions within the Don Callis Family.

items.h: AEW Dynamite scores highest ratings of 2026
items.p: Wednesday night’s episode of AEW Dynamite averaged 786,000 viewers on TBS, up 1.7% from the previous week. It ties the largest audience for the show since July 17, 2024. Dynamite averaged a 0.15...

items.h: AEW's Kyle Fletcher Talks Winning International Title In 'Ridiculous' Humidity
items.p: Kyle Fletcher has documented the day we won the AEW International Championship, and his battle against the humidity in Clearwater, Florida.

items.h: Will Ospreay Elaborates On Decision To Leave NJPW For AEW
items.p: Will Ospreay left NJPW after eight years for several reasons. He was able to keep his ties to the company when he joined AEW at Full Gear 2023.
